rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test (M2+)
50% magic rule (M3–M8)
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cross-module magic-distribution accounting; not judgeable from a single exercise file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Trust the agentic design — no human backstops
Quality ladder
One exercise = one bounded activity
Modules composable across variants
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Library-vs-variant fork accounting is a cross-file concern; not judgeable from one exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Three-level completeness
Pattern-recognition LOs need n≥2 instances with contrast
Progression-with-variations is the spine (9b)
Student agency — adults decide
Delegation — student brings, Claude screens
Split mega-exercise when phases = distinct skills + distinct artifacts
Artifact-realism check
Teach principle + technique — default
Auto-fire sim+eval after significant rewrite
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Process trigger for the author, not a property of the static file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go; live in prompts
Corporate infra = nice-to-have, never forcing function
Personal-first, team promotion via human conversation
Measure silent failure, not just friction
Don't pre-set categories before experiment runs
Verification layers sample DIFFERENT error distributions
Cheap-before-expensive verification ordering (21b)
Rule in memory without forcing function = worse than no rule
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Memory-to-forcing-function authoring discipline; not a property of this student-facing file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Short skeptical pushback on "done" = re-verify trigger
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Author/orchestrator re-verify behavior, not an in-file architecture rule.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cohort execution is trainer-paced + concurrent, not sequential
Host-skill optional; maintainer blocks trainer-only
Reflection beats: in-chat over file-write
Classroom = default delivery; body teaches work, trainer manages room
Eval = fixed yardstick; thing measured learns
Reading burden for verification = banned. Claude audits Claude
Self-report + self-audit charity — verify at artifact, over-flag or fresh-session
Offered structures need forced-engagement mechanic
Source-type blindness on ingestion
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No heterogeneous deck/slide ingestion in this exercise; session-transcript and git refs are homogeneous text/markdown sources.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Task selection drives outcome → name floor AND ceiling
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Task selection happened in M4; this exercise inherits the two-run artefacts rather than choosing a fresh task. Floor/ceiling callout belongs to the M4 task-selection exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer-block hedge naming section's own failure mode = cut-signal (34b)
Audience tier determines authoring substrate
Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust
Context-loading tiers as staged progression
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Context-loading-tier reveal is an earlier-module beat; this exercise teaches diff/author/invoke, not the auto/lazy/explicit-load tiers.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Removals are strategic — ask before cutting
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-time process rule (pause-and-ask before cutting entities); not a property of the finished file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Symmetric visible-mechanics > runtime fork when dual-runtime breaks agentic move
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: AE101 is CLI+Desktop single-agentic-runtime here; no dual-runtime fork in this exercise (the one CLI-only note is a Solo-collapse aside, not a runtime fork).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Load-bearing platform feature = no fallback. Gate or redesign
Eval architecture — partition by evidence source, not criterion count
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Judge/eval-architecture rule (governs the judging system), not the curriculum file under judgment.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Plug points + UX
Per-exercise leap test — 3 observable Monday outcomes
rules_evaluated.evidence: maintainer block carries Failure modes, Plug points, Decision points, Watch-fors, Mood target — but no section listing 3 observable Monday outcomes the student exhibits on their own codebase.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add a per-exercise leap test naming 3 falsifiable next-working-day outcomes (e.g. 'owns a session-shaper skill at ~/.claude/skills/ that fires on any future run', 'cut a stale rule from CLAUDE.local.md with a quoted why', 'invoked the skill on a real run and read its findings'); arc-mood carve-out names the artifact owned, not the activity.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch
Heavy fan-out prompts get body recovery callout
Save belongs with authoring, not loading
Convenience-driven prompts with known shape-bias → body acknowledgment callout
Deliberate-antipattern prompts = class-judge exempt, flagged-by-design
Session widget — shape; place by learning flow
Widgets carry semantics, not just emphasis (52b)
Pre-action framing doesn't preview prompt's payoff
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout, not forcing function
Multi-session ships as packaging, not new primitive
/clear = tool, not ceremony
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No /clear or close-protocol convergence beat in this exercise; the close is the ship + team-kit-candidate beat, handled by §18.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Inbound links preserve pedagogical beat across reference restructuring
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No reference-page restructuring in scope; this is a single exercise file with no inbound-link audit triggered.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Scan at the unit the rule names, not convenient larger one
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Judge-time scanning-granularity discipline (applied by this judge), not a property of the target file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify mechanism before proposing surgery
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-time discipline for proposing SKILL.md/tool changes; not a property of this student-facing file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Callouts next to prompts: steer, don't pre-empt
rules_evaluated.evidence: L24 'Claude will likely open with a four-dimension plan summary... Skim past the opening'; L25 'Expect Claude to over-credit the packaging on first pass'; L77 'If Claude narrates a plan or shows you the full question list before asking one at a time' — several callouts name one specific failure mode the current prompt mechanics invite, which rots if the prompt is re-tuned.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Where a callout names a single predicted failure (four-dimension plan preamble, over-credit-on-first-pass, full-question-list), prefer the generalising steer shape (notice → ask Claude why → relax/redirect) so the callout survives prompt re-tuning; the quote-enforcement and AskUserQuestion steers are already close.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Persistent TODO surfaces stale by default — audit before acting
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Punchlist-staleness audit discipline (acting on pre-cohort-todos.md bullets); not a property of this file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer blocks point, don't restate; link architecture doc where they touch delivery
rules_evaluated.evidence: L97-99 ship-location + team-kit-PR mechanics, L133-135 Plug points restate worktree/skill-home/transcript delivery facts, and Watch-fors restate auto-discovery — none carry a one-line pointer to training-architecture.md §<section> for the cross-cutting delivery mechanics they reference.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Where the body/maintainer block references delivery mechanics (worktree home, ~/.claude/skills/ auto-discovery, team-kit PR convention), add a one-line pointer to training-architecture.md §<section> rather than restating, so the facts can't rot in two places.
